about_me.subtitle: ABOUT ME
about_me.title: Hi, I'm Olha Chumbash!
about_me.description_1: I am a Junior Fullstack Developer, passionate about creating modern web applications and learning the latest technologies. I am constantly improving my knowledge, working on my own projects, and striving to write clean, high-quality, and maintainable code.
about_me.description_2: My previous professional experience has taught me to approach complex problems systematically, adapt quickly to new challenges, and find effective solutions. In my work, I value responsibility, attention to detail, teamwork, and open communication.
about_me.description_3: My goal is to grow as a Fullstack Developer, participate in building useful digital products, and contribute to the growth of the team and projects.

logistics_manager.title: Logistics Manager
logistics_manager.text: Coordinated logistics processes and managed a team of 5 drivers. Managed the budget and organized over 35 transport orders daily. Optimized processes, reducing delays by 20% and increasing overall work efficiency by 13%.

school_secretary.title: Secretary
school_secretary.text: Provided administrative support to a team of 25 employees. Managed over 200 documents, reports, and work records monthly. Improved office process organization and communication with parents and external partners.

item_1.title: Fullstack Developer
item_1.description: Training as a Fullstack Developer. Gained practical skills in creating modern web applications, working with both client-side and server-side technologies.

item_2.title: German Language Course B2
item_2.description: Intensive B2 level German language course designed to improve professional and everyday communication.
list: Preparation for working in a German-speaking environment

item_3.title: Meta Certificates
item_3.description: Online certification programs from Meta on web development and modern technologies.

item_4.title: Google Certificates
item_4.description: Google certification program focusing on the foundations of IT Support and Technical Maintenance.

item_5.title: SheCodes Certificates
item_5.description: Practical courses in web development and creating responsive web interfaces.

item_6.title: Bachelor of Laws

project_1.title: INTITA University
project_1.description: The official university website representing educational programs, study opportunities, and student interaction.
items: Development of a responsive and dynamic frontend using Vue.js and Nuxt 3.
Creation of interactive student registration and inquiry forms.
Web accessibility (a11y) improvements: semantic markup, ARIA attributes, screen reader support, and keyboard navigation.
Development of modal components with dynamic content, including PDF information blocks.

project_2.title: INTITA Technology Lyceum
project_2.description: A modern educational institution with a technological focus and a practical approach to learning.
items: Development of a responsive and dynamic frontend with Vue.js and Nuxt 3.
Implementation of multi-language support in Ukrainian and English.
Creation of interactive student registration and inquiry forms.
Integration of galleries, sliders, and Google Maps.

project_3.title: INJOBE
project_3.description: Job-matching platform for job search, vacancy management, and interaction between candidates and companies.
items: Development of an admin panel to manage users, vacancies, and job applications.
Implementation of backend logic using controllers, models, and API routes.
Designing and executing CRUD operations for vacancies and candidate profiles.
Form validation and error handling integration to improve system reliability.

project_4.title: Live Memory of Vinnytsia
project_4.description: A website dedicated to preserving the memory of those who gave their lives for the freedom of Ukraine. A space honoring courage, sacrifice, and love for the motherland.
items: Development and configuration of the database schema and migrations.
Implementation of server-side logic using controllers and models.
Creating APIs and Web routes for client-server interaction.
Form validation and error handling implementation.

project_5.title: KAVA VETERANA
project_5.description: A social support project for veterans, helping them develop professional skills and adapt to civilian life.
items: Development and maintenance of the admin panel.
Implementation of server-side logic and data management features.
Working with database structure, models, and migrations.
Performing CRUD operations for efficient data processing.
Testing API endpoints to ensure stable communication between frontend, backend, and administrative panels.

project_6.title: Oksana Tatarina School
project_6.description: An English language school website featuring courses, learning programs, and information for students.
items: Development of a pixel-perfect, responsive landing page.
Translating UI designs from Figma into a complete frontend implementation.
Creating interactive navigation and UI components.
Ensuring correct display across various devices.

project_7.title: Online German School
project_7.description: A German language learning platform focused on conversational practice and linguistic skill development.
items: Development of a responsive landing page to present the teacher's services.
Creation of interactive elements, sliders, and smooth navigation.
Optimization of the website for different devices and browsers.
Task management using Trello for an efficient workflow.

project_8.title: TUI Travel Agency
project_8.description: A travel agency website for vacation search and smooth client interaction.
items: Development of a visually accurate and responsive landing page.
Implementation of interactive sliders and smooth scrolling features.
Creation of a multilingual user interface.
Optimization of performance and cross-browser compatibility.

project_9.title: Employment Program for IT Beginners
project_9.description: A support project for specialists taking their first steps in IT and building their professional skill sets.
items: Development of a responsive landing page presenting the academy's courses and programs.
Creation of interactive blocks featuring video and information content.
Translating Figma design into a fully realized frontend.
Optimization of navigation and mobile layout.

project_10.title: Support Program for Veterans and IDPs
project_10.description: A social project aimed at developing IT skills and professional adaptation of veterans and internally displaced persons.
items: Development of a responsive and visually accurate landing page to present the academy's programs.
Translating Figma design layout into a complete frontend structure.
Creation of interactive sections, video blocks, and informational components.
Optimization of navigation, mobile responsiveness, and overall user experience.

cookie_banner.title: We use cookies
cookie_banner.description: This website uses cookies to improve usability and personalization. By continuing to use the site, you accept our

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how we collect, process, and protect your personal data on this website. The information below is provided in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and German legislation.

blocks.title: Controller
paragraphs: The website is operated by Olha Chumbash.
09111 Chemnitz, Germany
Email: olhachumbash{'@'}gmail.com

blocks.title: Data We Process
paragraphs: When you use the contact form or send an email, we process your name, email address, and the content of your message.
During your visit to the website, technical data such as IP address, browser type, request time, and requested pages may be stored in server log files.

blocks.title: Purpose and Legal Basis
paragraphs: We process your data to respond to inquiries, ensure the functionality of the website, and protect against abuse.
The legal basis is Article 6(1)(b) GDPR for contact requests and Article 6(1)(f) GDPR for legitimate interests in the secure and functional operation of the website.

blocks.title: Hosting and Security (SSL/TLS)
paragraphs: This website uses the services of an external hosting provider for the technical delivery of the pages. Visitor data (e.g., IP addresses) is processed on the provider's servers solely for the purpose of secure service delivery in accordance with Article 28 GDPR.
To protect your data during transmission, we use modern SSL or TLS encryption. You can recognize an encrypted connection by the padlock symbol in your browser's address bar and the https:// prefix.

blocks.title: Data Retention Period
paragraphs: Personal data is processed and stored only for the period necessary to achieve the purpose of its collection (e.g., to respond to your inquiry) or in accordance with statutory retention periods.

blocks.title: Cookies and Analytics
paragraphs: The website uses necessary cookies to store language settings and basic navigation. Optional analytical cookies may be used to improve website performance.
You can disable or delete cookies in your browser settings. Some features may become only partially available.

blocks.title: Your Rights
paragraphs: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, objection to processing, and data portability.
If you have any questions or complaints, you can contact us directly or file a complaint with the competent data protection authority in Germany.

impressum.title: Legal Notice (Impressum)
impressum.intro: In accordance with German legislation, the following mandatory information is provided for the operation of this website.

blocks.title: Operator
paragraphs: Olha Chumbash
09111 Chemnitz, Germany
Email: olhachumbash{'@'}gmail.com

blocks.title: Person Responsible for Content
paragraphs: Olha Chumbash
For questions regarding the content of the website, please contact the email address provided.

blocks.title: Disclaimer
paragraphs: The content of this website has been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the completeness, accuracy, or up-to-dateness of all materials.

blocks.title: EU Dispute Resolution (Online Dispute Resolution)
paragraphs: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.
We are neither obligated nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This website uses cookies for technical operations, analytics, and to improve the user experience.

blocks.title: What We Use
paragraphs: Technical cookies to save language preferences and navigation states.
Analytical cookies to understand how users interact with the website and to improve it.
